name: Roast Pork with Gravy (Crock Pot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork roast in the crock pot.
2. Do not add water or seasoning.
3. Cook on High for 6 to 8 hours until well-cooked.
4. Drain drippings into a small saucepan.
5. Thicken the gravy by stirring 1-2 tablespoons cornstarch into 1/4 cup cold water. Season to taste.
6. After dinner, return any uneaten pork roast and gravy to the crock pot.
7. Proceed with the barbecue instructions as directed.
Serving Ideas: Potato Pancakes, Broccoli, Applesauce
